message.content:
@startuml
actor Admin
participant "Employees Module" as EM #LightBlue20
database "Search Index" as SI #LightBlue20
database Database #LightBlue20

Admin -> EM : trigger task
activate EM
EM -> SI : reset index (delete + create)
deactivate SI
SI --> EM 
activate SI
EM -> Database : stream all employees
loop loop over each employee record from DB result set
    activate Database
    deactivate Database
    
    EM -> SI : index employee
end
Database -[dotted]-> EM 

note right of this\nAll lines are to be interpreted.\nThey represent communication paths,\nnor physical connections., LightYellow


@enduml
